name: open_multi_currency
description: Open directive with multiple allowed currencies. Reference (beancount v3) preserves source order.

known_divergences.beancount-parser-lima: Currency list order is non-deterministic across runs (appears to iterate a HashSet with randomized hashing) rather than preserving source order.
known_divergences.limabean: Currency list order is non-deterministic across runs (appears to iterate a HashSet with randomized hashing) rather than preserving source order.
